title: Cave Dweller Retextured - Deep Dark
description: This resource pack retextures the cave dweller to make it look like it came from the deep dark.
body:
This Resource Pack retextures the Cave Dweller from the Cave Dweller mod to look like it came from the deep dark. I decided to make this texture pack because I like making mods that are not the most vanilla friendly into vanilla friendly ones. Before you download this pack, make sure you have the Cave Dweller mod installed in your mods folder. The mod can be found using this link: https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dweller-fabric or the rework of the mod found though this link: https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dweller-evolved-(fabric)

Suggestions are welcomed for this resource pack or any other projects i work on in the future.
